notes: IAQ/odour remediation. Depict source-based deodorisation, not masking. Only occupant-safe devices shown with a technician present (air scrubbers, hydroxyl generators) — never ozone machines around people. Australian restoration settings, metric context, professional PPE. No on-image text, no brand names/logos.

images.context: Course hero for 'Air Quality and Odour: Identification and Deodorisation Essentials'
images.prompt: A professional restoration technician in nitrile gloves and an N95 respirator working in a bright, freshly dried Australian home interior, positioned over the shoulder and mid-distance, setting up a HEPA-and-carbon air scrubber to control lingering odour after water damage. Clean skirting boards and pale walls, warm daylight through the windows, orderly and methodical. Realistic professional photography, aspirational and calm.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no visible mould or filth, no smoke haze, no ozone machine near people

images.context: Module 7 & 8 — deodorisation equipment: HEPA/carbon air scrubber and occupant-safe hydroxyl generator
images.prompt: A close, hands-on-task view of a technician's gloved hands adjusting a portable air scrubber fitted with an activated carbon filter, with a hydroxyl generator running nearby in a clean, empty Australian room. Neat power lead to a standard Australian GPO, tidy setup, cool professional lighting. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no ozone machine, no US-style power outlets, no clutter

images.context: Module 5 — assessment: identifying the odour source with a handheld PID/VOC meter and moisture meter
images.prompt: Over-the-shoulder view of a technician in gloves holding a handheld photoionisation VOC meter close to a wall cavity while a pin moisture meter rests on a clipboard nearby, methodically tracing an odour source in a bright Australian interior. Focus on the instrument reading and the hands, shallow depth of field, professional and precise. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no fake screen numbers, no clutter, no visible mould growth
